children.text: Where is my Lift Pass Number?
If you don't know your lift pass number, please call 1-800-743-0242 (in US) or +1-970-496-6529 (INTL).
Please enter last name and zip code to validate your lift pass.
Please enter last name and country to validate your lift pass.
Please enter activation code to validate your lift pass.
If this is not your pass or PEAKS card, call 1-800-743-0242 (in US) 001+970-496-6529 (INTL)
